title: Dragons, 32-cm Collectible Articulated Dragon Toy Figure and Surprise Box Display Egg, Fidget Home Office and Desk Decor (Styles May Vary)
features: Collectible articulated dragon: Inside the dragon egg, discover a 32-cm articulated CrystaLynx Dragons figure. Each dragon has a matching egg for display and features stunning colours and details
Mix and match: Each CrystaLynx 3D dragon is durable and articulated with flexible joints to move and position them several ways. Mix and match their joints with any of the other dragons to customise
Collect them all: There are over 20 CrystaLynx Dragons to collect (each sold separately), including sets of rare twins. Collect them all

Gift ideas for all ages: These dragon surprise box figures are fun gifts for teens, adults and all ages. Those who enjoy fantasy and mythical creatures, 3D printed dragons, action figures and collectibles will love CrystaLynx Dragons fidget toys
Includes: 1 CrystaLynx Dragon, 1 Egg, 1 Collector Sheet

Trendy office fidgets and desk toys: Enhance your office decor with CrystaLynx Dragons. Their striking details and crystal eggs add a pop of colour to your home decor and office desk decor. A fun way to relax and relieve stress
This item is picked at random from an assortment of models, which may differ from those shown
description: Add a touch of fantasy to your life with CrystaLynx Dragons. Inside of a crystal egg, discover a matching 32-cm articulated dragon figure with stunning details. Featuring movable joints, CrystaLynx Dragons can be posed in a variety of mesmerising ways, offering a fun fidget experience and playful way to relax and relieve stress. There are over 20 different CrystaLynx Dragons to collect (each sold separately), with a chance of revealing rare twins. Mix and match your dragon’s joints with any of the CrystaLynx Dragons (each sold separately) to customise its look. With their rich colours and intricate details, CrystaLynx Dragons will stand out at home or in the office. Display your dragon in or out of its egg in the home office, on your desk, in the living room or anywhere you can imagine. For ages 8 and up, CrystaLynx Dragons figurines are a unique gift idea for kids, teens and adults. Bring home your own collectible CrystaLynx Dragons figure.
